heal_food.title: Eat a piece of food that restores health — understand natural recovery before potions

subtitle.text: The first medicine was food. The second medicine was rest. The third was something found in a plant.

description: CH.01 · BASIC MEDICINE
▸ Healing in Sinborn is layered.
Food restores health passively through saturation.
Potions restore it directly.
Diet mod (Ch02) multiplies both.
◈ SCROLL: On Basic Medicine
└ Found in: village healer chests, apothecary
structures, witch hut chests, herb gardens
└ Research time: 10 min
└ Unlocks: brewing preview, TWM tonic awareness
(The Witch's Meadow herbal medicine mod)
▸ TWM — The Witch's Meadow — adds herbal tonics.
Tonics are consumables that apply buffs.
The scroll system gatekeeps the more advanced tonics.
Basic medicine is where that chain starts.
▸ Sculk Sickness (from Ch08 onward) has five stages.
The cure is Ambrosia. Finding it before you need it
is basic medicine applied forward.
▶ Find the Basic Medicine scroll [check]
▶ Eat food to restore health [check]
◇ Cardiac mod tracks heart health separately from HP.
Pressure mod tracks cardiovascular strain.
Both are Ch01 systems — check them early.
